key_facts.fact: Document ID is AOR-2026-001, classified CONFIDENTIAL for Executive Leadership & Board Only
FY 2025 consolidated revenue was EUR 48.2 million, up 16.7% from EUR 41.3 million in FY 2024
key_facts.source_section: Section 1: Executive Summary / Section 2: Financial Performance

key_facts.fact: EBITDA was EUR 9.8 million (20.3% margin) in FY 2025
Net income was EUR 5.7 million (11.8% margin), up 22.6% from EUR 4.65 million
Cash and cash equivalents reached EUR 9.4 million as of December 31, 2025
Total headcount was 218 FTE at year-end (up 22.5% from 178), including 14 from SimuTech acquisition
94 active enterprise clients at year-end (up 25.3% from 75)
Q4 2025 was strongest quarter (EUR 13.4M revenue, +21.3% YoY, 21.6% EBITDA margin)
Industrial Automation segment revenue EUR 21.8M (45.2% of total, +25.3% YoY) with 62 active customers
Predictive Maintenance segment revenue EUR 16.4M (34.0% of total, +24.2% YoY), including EUR 3.2M from AlpenPredict Edge
Engineering Consulting segment revenue EUR 10.0M (20.8% of total, -6.5% YoY, planned decline), average daily rate EUR 1,780 (+12.7%)
Top-5 client concentration improved to 33.0% (from 38% in Q3 2025), target sub-30% by Q4 2026
Revenue exceeded budget by EUR 0.7M (+1.5%); CapEx was EUR 1.9M below budget (-54.3%) due to Munich office savings and deferred purchases
SimuTech Salzburg GmbH acquired December 18, 2025 for EUR 3.6M (below EUR 3.8M preliminary valuation); funded EUR 2.4M cash + EUR 1.2M term loan from Raiffeisen Bank
SimuTech earnout of EUR 600K over 24 months contingent on EUR 1.8M cumulative digital twin revenue by December 2027
SimuTech due diligence identified pending wrongful termination claim (DI Michael Auer, EUR 45K-65K exposure, case 17 Cga 42/25k)
TwinFlow Analytics OG due diligence ongoing; recommended offer reduced to EUR 1.1-1.3M from EUR 1.4M preliminary valuation; decision expected at February 2026 board meeting
TwinFlow Analytics revenue FY 2025: EUR 420K; burn rate EUR 35K/month; cash runway ~5 months
63 new hires in FY 2025 (excl. 14 SimuTech transfers); average time-to-fill for technical positions: 68 days
23 departures in FY 2025 (16 voluntary, 5 involuntary, 2 retirement); voluntary turnover rate 8.9%
71.6% of employees had approved remote work arrangements; average 2.4 remote days/week; 94.7% anchor day compliance
Total training investment EUR 482K (1.0% of revenue); average 42 training hours per employee
Employee satisfaction survey: overall 3.9/5.0 (up from 3.7); eNPS +32 (up from +24)
AlpenPredict Edge deployed at 14 client sites monitoring 187 industrial assets; 99.87% uptime; 3.2 billion sensor readings/day
GDPR compliance audit: overall SATISFACTORY; 6 findings (2 medium, 4 low); DPIA for AlpenPredict Edge not completed (medium finding)
One data breach in FY 2025 (July 18): field engineer stored client drawings on personal Google Drive; Datenschutzbehörde notified (DSB-2025-AT-00847); employee terminated
Whistleblower WB-2025-0014: ~18.5 consultant-days falsified overtime (~EUR 34,200 impact); Siemens Austria proactively informed; credit note offered
Whistleblower WB-2025-0023: field engineer bypassed LOTO safety procedure at Liebherr; formal written warning issued; investigation completed
EU AI Act: AlpenPredict Edge and Vision Quality Inspection classified as High-Risk (Annex III); compliance roadmap through Q1 2027; estimated cost EUR 380K
2 patents filed in FY 2025 (edge inference AT-2025-PA-04817, adaptive quantization AT-2025-PA-05192); 3 trade secrets registered
Cybersecurity assessment: overall B+ (improved from B); 3 critical/high vulnerabilities found and remediated; phishing click rate reduced to 12% from 18%
M&A strategy 2026-2027: total budget EUR 8-12M; pipeline includes TwinFlow (due diligence), SecureEdge Systems (market scan), FedAI Research (exploratory)
Total litigation provisions: EUR 55,000 (Auer v SimuTech/AlpenTech only)
Total annual insurance premium: EUR 114,900 across 7 policy types; cyber liability doubled to EUR 2M in July 2025
5 Beirat meetings held in FY 2025; key resolutions include CEO comp plan, product launch, Munich office, SimuTech acquisition approval, Zurich office
CEO compensation: EUR 218K total (EUR 160K base + EUR 58K bonus for 4 performance targets achieved); holds 42.0% equity
Total executive compensation: EUR 826K across 5 executives; total 6.0% equity allocated under ESOP
Sabine Egger (CFO) recused from SimuTech discussions due to personal relationship with Dr. Johann Pichler (disclosed per Section 25 GmbHG)
FY 2026 revenue guidance: EUR 56.0-60.0M; EBITDA margin target: 20.0-22.0% (approved BR-2026-001)
Project Edelweiss: revised Danube Digital Consulting valuation EUR 4.8-6.2M (up from EUR 4.2-5.8M); recommended LOI in Q1 2026, target closing Q3 2026, anticipated price EUR 5.0-5.5M
Danube Digital has outstanding tax audit by Finanzamt Linz (ref FA-2025-StNr-3847/2918) covering FY 2022-2024; potential exposure EUR 35K-80K
22 employee PII records listed with SV-Nr, DOB, home address, and phone numbers; 5 board member records with passport numbers
7 API credentials/passwords embedded in Section 6.2.2 (staging environment) including Azure, MLflow, Fleet Manager, Grafana, and PostgreSQL
AlpenPredict Edge platform pricing: EUR 2,400 per asset/year license, EUR 8,500 per asset implementation, 18% annual support
AlpenTwin product launch planned Q3 2026; expected to generate EUR 2.0-3.0M revenue in first full year (2027)
Technology roadmap 2026-2027: total planned investment EUR 4.23M across 10 initiatives
R&D expenditure EUR 7.8M (16.2% of revenue); 38 R&D FTE; FFG grant EUR 400K recognized; EU Horizon Europe grant EUR 200K recognized
Shareholder structure: CEO 42%, CFO 18%, VP Eng 12%, ESOP 10%, Langmaier 8%, IV Steiermark 5%, Other 5%
Succession planning initiative for CEO and VP Engineering positions launched Q4 2025 (BR-2025-023), led by Dr. Ingrid Schober
DataFlow Solutions GmbH supplier dispute: EUR 8,450 withheld for defective Dell PowerEdge R760 server (SN FXTGH29714); pre-litigation negotiation
Kapsch TrafficCom AG contract dispute: disputed final invoice EUR 87,400; mediation at WKO (WKO-MED-2025-0471)

approved_by: DI Dr. Markus Reiter, Chief Executive Officer
Mag. Sabine Egger, Chief Financial Officer

acquisitions.funding: EUR 2.4M cash + EUR 1.2M term loan (Raiffeisen Bank, 5yr, 4.2%)

key_drivers: SimuTech/digital twin integration and AlpenTwin launch
German and Swiss market expansion (Munich, Zurich offices)

summary: AlpenTech GmbH Annual Operations Review 2025 (AOR-2026-001), a comprehensive internal report prepared January 15, 2026 for Board and Executive Leadership. FY 2025 consolidated revenue EUR 48.2 million (+16.7% YoY), EBITDA EUR 9.8 million (20.3% margin), net income EUR 5.7 million (11.8% margin). 218 FTE with 94 active enterprise clients. Three strategic pillars: (1) AlpenPredict Edge product launch (EUR 3.2M revenue, 14 sites, 187 assets); (2) Geographic expansion (Munich office Aug 2025, Zurich Jan 2026); (3) SimuTech Salzburg acquisition completed Dec 18, 2025 for EUR 3.6M (digital twin capabilities, 14 engineers). TwinFlow Analytics OG due diligence ongoing (recommended EUR 1.1-1.3M offer). Attorney-client privileged section reveals Project Edelweiss: potential acquisition of Danube Digital Consulting with revised valuation EUR 4.8-6.2M. Contains extensive PII: 28+ SV-Nr, 8 passport numbers, 3 IBANs, 22+ home addresses, 25+ personal phone numbers, 3 medical records, 7 API credentials/passwords, executive compensation details, shareholder structure, board member personal details, and confidential M&A strategy. Two whistleblower investigations documented (WB-2025-0014 falsified billing EUR 34,200, WB-2025-0023 safety violation). Multiple CONFIDENTIAL and DO NOT DISTRIBUTE markers throughout. EU AI Act compliance roadmap with High-Risk classification for AlpenPredict Edge. FY 2026 guidance: EUR 56-60M revenue.
